title: Translink NI Railways Class 172/4000 Series Turbostar (MTR4)
description: Bringing Northern Ireland's 4000 Series livery into Minecraft Transit Railway!
body:
![4000 Series livery represented on a Turbostar bodyshell arriving into a train station.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0b9f9b57603a3d8d296dfec3699bc8273c91547.png)

# **Ever dreamed of taking the train to Coleraine?**
If you can't make it across the sea, Minecraft Transit Railway is here to help!

Featuring a Bombardier Turbostar, with sounds kindly made by Navi, representing the livery carried by Translink Northern Ireland Railways' CAF 4000 Series DMUs
